title: 22 Pcs 50th Birthday Decorations, Black Gold 50th Birthday Banners 12 Inches Balloons for Women and Men arty Decorations
features: Package Included: Reusable birthday decoration set includes 2 pcs happy birthday banners for 50 years old( 2 styles), 1 pc triangle flags with 12 pcs different patterns, 10 pcs latex balloons(5 pc black, 5 pcs golden), 300+ pcs Birthday Confetti.
Odorless Material: 50th birthday banners are made of paper, sturdy, and durable. Birthday balloons are made of synthetic latex, safe to use.

Easy to Use: Each card has two holes at the top, you can use a ribbon to string the 50th birthday banners and triangle flag. Use a towel or blanket to wipe the confetti balloon, and shake it slowly, these colorful pieces stick on the sides of the balloon.

Unforgettable Memory: 50th birthday decorations are mainly black gold. Unique shapes birthday banners and balloon suits make your party more active and perfect, creating an unforgettable 50th birthday memory for you, your family, and your friends.

Wide Use: 50th party decorations are suitable for birthday/wedding party decoration and anniversary celebration decor. You can hang them on the wall, door, window, indoors or outdoors, adding a more joyful atmosphere.
description: Product Description Package Including 50th Birthday Flag Bunting x 1 Happy 50th Birthday Banner x 1 Triangle-shaped Banner x 9 Black Latex Balloons with Gold Logo x 5 Confetti Latex Balloons x 5 Birthday Confetti x 300+ Thread Needle x 1 Golden Ribbon x 1 White Ribbon x 2 Do not overfill the balloons, also avoid excessive heat, sharp objects, and excessive friction.
